description_long: This is a weathered, rectangular telephone booth with a metal frame and large glass panels on three sides, allowing visibility into the interior. The booth features a flat, slightly rusted metal roof and a concrete or stone floor, with ventilation grilles at the base of the rear and side panels. The front side has a large opening, likely for a door, and inside, a classic telephone handset is mounted on the right wall. The upper front panel has a faded, light-colored sign area, possibly for labeling or instructions. The overall appearance suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban outdoor environments.
description: A weathered, metal-framed telephone booth with large glass panels, a flat roof, and a visible handset inside. The booth features a faded sign area and ventilation grilles at the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entrance, interior telephone handset, and faded sign panel above.
description_view_1: Rear view with solid glass panel, ventilation grilles at the bottom, and no visible entrance.
description_view_2: Side view with glass panels and ventilation grilles, no visible entrance or handset.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 2, with glass panels and ventilation grilles.
attribute_window_configuration: three large glass panels on front, left, and right sides; solid rear panel with ventilation grilles
attribute_signage_or_labeling: faded light-colored sign panel above the entrance
